title: philibertia variifolia
intro: Philibertia variifolia is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, also known as a type of vining plant or a climbing plant native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to cause numbness or local anesthesia when applied topically. This numbness-inducing property makes Philibertia variifolia a valuable resource for pain relief and has been used to treat various health issues, such as pain, inflammation, and even snake bites. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create topical creams or ointments, and in some cases, it's also used to make tinctures or teas, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
